# game-mytownmap Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2025-12-30

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript 5.x targeting modern evergreen browsers; bun for tooling/runtime where applicable. + PixiJS for 2D rendering; bitECS for ECS runtime; bun toolchain; Playwright for UI/E2E; vitest for unit/integration; New Relic browser agent (errors only); Cloudflare Pages hosting. (001-project-requirements)

tests/
